field_values.action_summary: Now recognized as a conqueror and chieftain, Carter escorts Dejah Thoris out of the audience chamber, accompanied by Woola.
field_values.emotional_beat: From tension to a sense of protective purpose/movement.
field_values.camera_intent: Tracking shots following the group exit; Wide shots establishing scale of chamber and city
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Tight grouping of john_carter, dejah_thoris, and woola
Consistent character spacing during movement through hallways
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH010_SC006

## Production Intent
Establish the new status of john_carter as a chieftain and protector through a decisive exit from the audience chamber. The movement must feel purposeful, transitioning the characters from the political tension of the Thark court into an active mission phase.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- dejah_thoris
- woola

## Required Environments
- thark_audience_chamber

## Continuity Constraints
- Tight grouping of john_carter, dejah_thoris, and woola
- Consistent character spacing during movement through hallways

## Beat List
- BT001: Group turns to depart the chamber
- BT002: Crossing the threshold
- BT003: Movement into the hallways
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
